name: csi-breathing-zkp
description: Zero-Knowledge Proof circuits for CSI breathing rate verification

scripts.compile:all: npm run compile:full_similarity && npm run compile:wavelet && npm run compile:music && npm run compile:breathing_normality && npm run compile:breathing_certificate
scripts.setup:full_similarity: snarkjs groth16 setup build/csi_full_similarity.r1cs keys/powersOfTau28_hez_final_20.ptau keys/csi_full_similarity_0000.zkey && echo 'random entropy for zkp setup' | snarkjs zkey contribute keys/csi_full_similarity_0000.zkey keys/csi_full_similarity_final.zkey --name='First contribution' -v && snarkjs zkey export verificationkey keys/csi_full_similarity_final.zkey keys/csi_full_similarity_verification_key.json
scripts.setup:wavelet: snarkjs groth16 setup build/csi_wavelet_similarity.r1cs keys/powersOfTau28_hez_final_19.ptau keys/csi_wavelet_similarity_0000.zkey && echo 'random entropy for zkp setup wavelet' | snarkjs zkey contribute keys/csi_wavelet_similarity_0000.zkey keys/csi_wavelet_similarity_final.zkey --name='Wavelet contribution' -v && snarkjs zkey export verificationkey keys/csi_wavelet_similarity_final.zkey keys/csi_wavelet_similarity_verification_key.json
scripts.setup:music: snarkjs groth16 setup build/csi_music_similarity.r1cs keys/powersOfTau28_hez_final_19.ptau keys/csi_music_similarity_0000.zkey && echo 'random entropy for zkp setup music' | snarkjs zkey contribute keys/csi_music_similarity_0000.zkey keys/csi_music_similarity_final.zkey --name='Music contribution' -v && snarkjs zkey export verificationkey keys/csi_music_similarity_final.zkey keys/csi_music_similarity_verification_key.json
scripts.setup:breathing_normality: snarkjs groth16 setup build/csi_breathing_normality.r1cs keys/powersOfTau28_hez_final_19.ptau keys/csi_breathing_normality_0000.zkey && echo 'random entropy for zkp setup breathing' | snarkjs zkey contribute keys/csi_breathing_normality_0000.zkey keys/csi_breathing_normality_final.zkey --name='Breathing contribution' -v && snarkjs zkey export verificationkey keys/csi_breathing_normality_final.zkey keys/csi_breathing_normality_verification_key.json
scripts.setup:breathing_certificate: snarkjs groth16 setup build/csi_breathing_certificate.r1cs keys/powersOfTau28_hez_final_19.ptau keys/csi_breathing_certificate_0000.zkey && echo 'random entropy for zkp setup certificate' | snarkjs zkey contribute keys/csi_breathing_certificate_0000.zkey keys/csi_breathing_certificate_final.zkey --name='Certificate contribution' -v && snarkjs zkey export verificationkey keys/csi_breathing_certificate_final.zkey keys/csi_breathing_certificate_verification_key.json
scripts.setup:all: npm run setup:full_similarity && npm run setup:wavelet && npm run setup:music && npm run setup:breathing_normality && npm run setup:breathing_certificate
scripts.ptau:generate_dev: snarkjs powersoftau new bn128 19 keys/pot19_0000.ptau && snarkjs powersoftau contribute keys/pot19_0000.ptau keys/pot19_final.ptau --name='dev' -e='csi-dev-entropy' && snarkjs powersoftau prepare phase2 keys/pot19_final.ptau keys/powersOfTau28_hez_final_19.ptau -v
